events.venue: Louise Watley Library at Southeast Atlanta
events.sourceName: Fulton County Library Family Events

events.title: Crafting Community: A Character Education Workshop
events.description: Crafting Community: A Character Education Workshop Join us in the Exploration Room on Saturday, June 6 at 10:30 AM - 11:30 AM. Be part of a fun and interactive paper puppet show where families will celebrate the everyday heroes who help make our neighborhoods vibrant and joyful. Little ones will discover the many roles people play…

events.title: Sensory Friendly Playtime: Play at the Museum
events.description: Enjoy a sensory-modified playtime from 9:00 AM – 11:00 AM on Sunday, June 7! This experience includes limited admission and sound adjustments. Sensory Packs are available upon request at the Welcome Center and contain headphones, sunglasses, and a selection of sensory toys. Simply check one out with a team member upon arrival. Review our social story to&hell
